# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-service
spec:
  gateways: ["mesh"] 
  hosts:
    - third-party-host2 #  <== provide a single entry for all the hostnames that should be accessible by this service
    - third-party-host1  # (don't add to this one) 
  http:
  - match:
      - uri:
          prefix: /
    route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-host2   #  <== provide a single entry for all the hostnames that should be accessible by this service
        port: 
          number: 8093
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - third-party-host2 #  <== provide a single entry for all the hostnames that should be accessible by this service
    - third-party-host1  # (don't add to this one) 
  port: 
    number: 8093             #  <== provide a single port entry for all the ports that should be accessible by this service
    name:  http             #  (default port name is "http", no need to specify here).
  location: MESH_INTERNAL   #  (This configures internal communications via DNS resolution and traffic routing.)
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata: 
  name: third-party-servicegateway
spec:
   selector:
     istio: ingressgateway  # (Selects gateway pods for all namespaces.)

- Add ServiceEntry config files to the manifests folder and update the Istio deployment manifest so that it references these config files. Create a namespace, deploy the Istio mesh via an Ansible playbook or Kustomization.yaml file. Install Istio’s core components into this namespace. Start your app and deploy the third-party service config to all namespaces in the mesh using an ansible playbook or Kustomization.yaml file.  Use a kustomize command to apply this manifest without editing it.
